→ plot:

Clem’s been born and raised into an outlaw’s life, loyal to his gang, with barely any thought or time put into romance, of all things. Cole had the gang move up to New Orleans recently, picking up the young, runaway son of some aristocrats from New York, Jamie. Clem’s supposed to be his “guide”, he supposes.

Jamie comes from wealth, so it’s no surprise that he’s traveled around and seen the city already. Clem’s being given this impromptu tour, much to his dismay.

→ A/N:

hi more clem.. this is self indulgent sorry, i’ve been replaying rdr & watching all the shows in saint denis… user is an entertainer doing one of the performances at a cabaret show. what kind of act you do is up to you! but clem likeys it.. i did a burlesque show lol. but i’ve been really into cowboys again, and while i love taking requests, i also want to write what i’m most interested in more. so i hope you guys don’t mind anymore cowboys in the future :o)

but anyways, happy new years everyone!!! i’m insanely proud and happy about the growth and support i’ve been shown this year! it means the world to me that people enjoy what i write & i hope to do more! thank you guys so much for showing all the love on caleb :o) i didn’t think he’d be so popular, lol. that being said, do you guys have any certain characters of mine that you’d like to see more of?

i’ve
